node.text: Jolene finds peace and connection to nature and herself while doing yoga with beautiful backdrops.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "park bench special") on Session 29 (Score: 0.58)

node.text: Jolene plans to reconnect with nature again the following month.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "park bench special") on Session 29 (Score: 0.58)

node.text: Jolene plans to go together to the peaceful spot near the lake with Deborah.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "bench special park") on Observation 8 (Score: 0.61)

node.text: Jolene finds inspiration in the small things and believes in continuous growth through obstacles.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "park bench special") on Session 29 (Score: 0.58)

node.text: Jolene loves going for walks to take in nature and finds peaceful spots like the lake surrounded by trees to be calming and tranquil.
Jolene takes photos of nature and finds nature to be refreshing and a way to hit a reset button.
Jolene practices yoga and meditation to relax and stay focused.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "park bench special") on Session 19 (Score: 0.56)

node.text: Jolene has a snake as a pet, finds it calming, and a great connection with nature.
Jolene believes pets like Susie make life brighter and bring comfort and peace.
Jolene uses essential oils and soothing music to create a peaceful atmosphere for relaxation during yoga and meditation.
